platform_decisions.content: PR review uses specialized agents per dimension (comments, tests, errors, types, quality, simplification) not a single reviewer
Review agents conditionally applicable based on change type (test files, types, docs)
Code reviewer uses 0-100 confidence scoring, only reports issues >= 80 to minimize false positives
Review output stratified: Critical (90-100), Important (80-89), Suggestions, plus mandatory Positive Observations
Code simplifier runs after review passes, not before (correctness first, then readability)
Comment analyzer is advisory-only; never modifies code directly
Test coverage focuses on behavioral coverage not line coverage; prioritizes regression-catching tests
Test gap criticality rated 1-10: 9-10 data loss/security, 7-8 user-facing errors, 5-6 edge cases
Silent failure detection: empty catch blocks never acceptable, all errors logged with severity/context
Error handling severity: CRITICAL for silent failures, HIGH for poor messages, MEDIUM for missing context
Type design quality: 4 independent dimensions (encapsulation, invariant expression, usefulness, enforcement) rated 1-10
Type design: illegal states must be unrepresentable, constructor validation mandatory, compile-time > runtime
PR review recommended proactively before PR creation, with re-run after fixes
Ralph loop uses Stop hook to intercept exit and feed same prompt back for in-session self-referential loop
Loop termination: max_iterations (hard limit) or completion_promise (exact string match in XML tags)
Loop state stored in local md file with YAML frontmatter; cancellable via file removal
Loop iteration enforces strict numeric validation with self-healing: corrupted state files deleted
Ralph loop restricted to tasks with automatic verification; not for human judgment or production debugging
Feature dev enforces mandatory clarifying questions phase before architecture; cannot be skipped
Feature dev uses parallel multi-agent codebase exploration (2-3 agents with different focus areas)
Architecture design presents multiple approaches with trade-off comparison and recommendation
Implementation gated on explicit user approval after architecture design
Quality review uses 3 parallel reviewers with different axes (simplicity, bugs, conventions)
Code architect agent uses sonnet model and delivers single decisive blueprint
commit command restricts tools to only git add, git status, git commit
commit-push-pr creates new branch if on main, preventing direct main commits
commit-push-pr executes all steps in single message as atomic operation
Branch cleanup detects and removes worktrees before branch deletion
Opus 4.5 migration updates model strings only; prompt changes only on explicit behavioral issues
Migration excludes Haiku models and removes context-1m beta header with explanatory comment
Opus 4.5 effort defaults to high with 3 tiers independent of thinking budget
Prompt adjustments use XML tags matching existing structure; placed by logical proximity
Tool overtriggering addressed by softening imperative language in tool-triggering instructions only
Thinking sensitivity: replace think variants with alternatives only when extended thinking not enabled
Agent SDK setup asks questions one at a time to reduce cognitive load
SDK setup verifies latest package version via WebSearch or package registry before installation
TypeScript SDK requires tsc noEmit with zero errors before setup is complete
SDK verification uses language-specific verifier agents consulting official docs via WebFetch
SDK verifier focuses on SDK functionality only; excludes general code style preferences
API key handling requires env-example file with placeholder, env file in gitignore, no hardcoded keys in source
Learning mode requests user code only for meaningful trade-offs, never for boilerplate
Learning contributions framed as valuable input with pre-prepared file context
Explanatory output uses structured format with star symbol and rule delimiters, embedded in conversation
Output style modes injected via SessionStart hook additionalContext
Security reminder blocks on first detection per file-per-session via PreToolUse exit 2
Security warning deduplication session-scoped via state file keyed by session_id
Security reminder disableable via env var escape hatch
Security patterns categorized: path-based (GitHub Actions) and content-based (eval/exec/innerHTML/pickle)
GitHub Actions security: env vars for untrusted inputs, not direct expression interpolation
Security state files purged probabilistically (10 pct chance per invocation, 30-day threshold)
Frontend design requires bold aesthetic direction selection before coding; intentionality over defaults
Frontend explicitly prohibits generic AI aesthetics (standard fonts, purple gradients, predictable layouts)
Code review gates on haiku pre-check: skips closed/draft PRs and already-reviewed PRs
Code review two-stage validation: parallel bug detection then parallel validation of each flagged issue
Code review only flags high-signal: compilation failures, definite logic errors, exact CLAUDE.md violations
Inline review comments include committable suggestions only for small self-contained fixes
Review comment posting conditioned on --comment flag; default is terminal-only output (dry-run)
Review agents told tools are functional; every tool call must have clear purpose (no exploratory calls)
CLAUDE.md compliance scoped by file path: only ancestor-directory CLAUDE.md files apply
Review model assignment: haiku for gates, sonnet for comprehension, opus for bug detection
Code simplifier enforces minimum complexity; no helpers for one-time operations, no speculative abstractions
